feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to Download License file for SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently trying to set up SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04, but I'm facing an issue with downloading the license file. Specifically, I am unable to download the file named "SAP ABAP AS Part License", which is required to complete the installation process.
Each time I try to access the license file, the download either fails. I've checked multiple browsers and internet connections, but the issue persists.

Is anyone else experiencing the same problem, or is there an alternative link or solution to obtain the license file?

entry.title: Entry RMEW PTWY does not exist in /SCWM/TACTTY (check entry)
entry.content:
Could you please help me anyone to find out the error?

/SCWM/TACTTY what it is exactly?

 

Regards,

Ravi.

entry.title: SAP RAP: Automatically add row to table when another entity is created.
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question regarding SAP RAP development.

I have a case like: one root entity and two children entities A and B with cardinality [0..*]. I use managed RAP scenario with draft and I want to create automatically entity B in draft when the entity A in draft is created. Is it possible somehow?
So it should look like: I have object page of root entity, there are two tables of entities A and B. When I click create on the table with entity A - row to the table with entity B should also be added.
How to achieve that?

Thanks in advance,
Mikolaj

entry.title: Multiple Table View on Object Pages in CAPM
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I needed to render multiple views on a table in an object page. I understand this is usually doable in list report pages and also referring to link (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/cap-with-fiori-elements-configure-multiple-views-on-list-report-tables/ba-p/13579909) for the same. Is there a way the same feature can be developed in objects pages too?

Thank you!

entry.title: Hi, Is there any hana alternative to SM30 table maintenance ?
entry.content: Hi, Is there any hana alternative to SM30 table maintenance ?

entry.title: When to create my own badi?
entry.content:
Hi, еxperts.
In mine system i have a list of 'Z*' customer badi's, but all of them are empty.
Can someone explain Why does the possibility to create custom BAdIs exist at all if i want to enhance mine own project i can do it without badi's.

entry.title: Parameter MASTER_IDOC_CONTROL versus COMMUNICATION_IDOC_CONTROL? (MASTER_IDOC_DISTRIBUTE)
entry.content:
I understand the parameter MASTER_IDOC_DATA of the function module MASTER_IDOC_DISTRIBUTE, which is to contain the segments of all Outbound IDOCs to be created, but what's the difference between MASTER_IDOC_CONTROL (structure of type EDIDC) and COMMUNICATION_IDOC_CONTROL (table with lines of type EDIDC)?

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: HCM - Payroll Issue
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm facing an issue recently when I try to run a payroll cycle on SAP.
issue message "No entry in table T512W for key EG for time 31.07.2025. I already checked the table and found the wage type exists. Also, I checked the processing class and everything is alright. In addition to checking the MOLGA country grouping and its already configured and linked.

 I tried to search a lot for a reason for this error message but with no answers.

If anyone already faced this issue kindly share the solution with me for urgent reason.

entry.title: How many IDOC maximum can be passed directly to an Inbound IDOC processing function module
entry.content:
My custom program calls the function module IDOC_INPUT_GLMAST to change G/L Account Master data (transaction code FS00, tables SKA1, SKAT, SKB1). This function module is the one corresponding to the processing of the IDOC type GLMAST01 / message type GLMAST (this can be seen in the transaction code WE57).

The function module is called without a real IDOC, instead I pass a fake IDOC control record and fake IDOC segments (fake IDOC number 1).

It works well if I simulate 1 IDOC, but it fails if calling the function module with 2 IDOC in the parameters. The first one still succeeds but the second one always return the error message FH500 Internal error: Different accounts transferred.

What is the problem?

Sandra

entry.title: Issue in UNIT_CONVERSION in CDS View Entity
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to perform unit conversion in CDS view entities in version 75I. So, trying to use unit_conversion, however it ends with SQL code 719.
My CDS view:

Error with execution:

Database returned the SQL code 719. Error text: currency/unit conversion error: search table error: Conversion( "COL$11$" ),
row 0: could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s) 7 from unit 'ST' to unit 'KAR' for client '010'

Both these unit are part of T006 table.

Could you please provide valuable inputs to solve the same.

Regards,

JR

entry.title: How to clear parameter after clicking selective radio button in selection-screen?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Devs,

I was doing my best for coding practice, but I got stuck on one problem, which I was unable to find anywhere. Here's the problem:- The code I was writing in AT SELECTION-SCREEN for screen-input for two parameters, where I executed my code, then I added values to the parameters, and here I am confused. There are two parameters (radius & diameter) and two radio buttons with having same name. When I try to click the radius radio button, the diameter parameter value doesn't clear and vice versa. Below are my code and snapshots.

PLEASE HELP!!! 

Requirement: When I click the radio button, only that parameter value should be taken further, and the other parameter must be cleared.

entry.title: Re: How to clear parameter after clicking selective radio...
entry.content:
Hi @JayeshHati1997,

You're on the right path! Getting stuck is part of the process, and it's great that you're practicing and doing your best to solve things on your own. Keep at it!

Regarding your code:

You're using AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT with a LOOP AT SCREEN, trying to clear fields based on radiobutton selection. However, this doesn't work as expected because:

  1. AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT is executed before the screen is displayed and there are other events that are more suitable for this handling.

  2.  screen-name CS 'pradius' only checks the name of the screen field, not whether the user selected a radiobutton. To check if a radiobutton is selected, you should use a direct check like:

IF p_rad EQ 'X'.
  " Your logic here
ENDIF.

  That means p_rad is selected. If it’s initial, it means it's not selected. The same applies to p_dia.

Recommended fix:

    Use the USER-COMMAND rb that you added to the radio button group and handle the logic in the AT SELECTION-SCREEN event. This way, the code runs after the user interacts with the radiobuttons in the GRB1 group:

AT SELECTION-SCREEN.
  IF sy-ucomm EQ 'RB'.
    " Your logic here.
  ENDIF.

You can also use:

AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON RADIOBUTTON GROUP grb1.

 

With the event AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON RADIOBUTTON GROUP grb1 you don't need the USER-COMMAND rb defined in the PARAMETER and can handle it from the identifier of the radibutton group.

For further reference and more examples, these SAP documentation links might help:
  • Selection Screens – Block and Radio Button Processing ( Good code examples for your request );
  • AT SELECTION-SCREEN statement.

Hope this helps. Keep experimenting!
Any questions, just let me know.

Regards,
Hugo Loiola.

entry.title: Get technical information from Service Definition using ABAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

Does anyone know if there is any class or function module I could use to read the technical information of a service definition? For example, I want to get the entities exposed from the service definition along with their alias and then also read the fields of these entities with their alias. If there is no such class or function module, does anyone know on which tables I can find these information?

Thank you!

entry.title: BAPI to remove ship-to from business partner
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is that any BAPI or FM to remove ship-to from the business partner?

Recently we have done upgrade S4 HANA. Earlier we use BDC to remove ship-to from the sold-to via XD02 t.code and works well. Now after upgrade we can't do via BDC. So, is that any BAPI or FM to achieve the case?

Thanks,

Dhina.

entry.title: bapi_po_create1 : passing standard table field J_1BNBM into bapi
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
I have a field J_1BNBM in EKPO table which is getting field with control code.
There is validaion in po creation ME21N using method IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM to make the field as mandatory due to which I am getting the
same error while using the BAPI_PO_CREATE1.
However, there is no field available  in line item of BAPI_PO_CREATE1 of related to J_1BNBM or control code.
The bapi will only post the PO if I could able to pass control_code(J_1BNBM)  using the same BAPI.
I thought of using as well as tried to achieve it through extension . But extension is for only customer add on fields .

J_1BNBM is standard field in EKPO and not customer field.

How to resolve this issue as I am at crossroads now ?

entry.title: How to Update standart fields of me31k?
entry.content:
Hi, experts, if there is an enhancement for changing ekpo/ekko fields in me31k?

i found badi's 

ME_CHECK_OA

ME_PROCESS_REQ

BAdI definition is only provided for SAP internal use

and exit's like 
EXIT_SAPMM06E_016
EXIT_SAPMM06E_017
EXIT_SAPMM06E_018
But it's only for changing and importing z-fields, as i undestood
What i should do to change standart field, like EKPO-SPINF(InfoUpdate)?

entry.title: How to run ATC checks only on code delta of a changed object?
entry.content:
We are currently using the on-premise 2021 version of our S/4 HANA system. We would like to understand the procedure for running ATC (ABAP Test Cockpit) checks specifically on delta code changes, rather than executing checks on the entire object each time.
 
Could you please provide us with information or documentation on how to configure and execute ATC checks to focus only on the modifications made to the code?

entry.title: ISU_DB_QMEL_UPDATE Update QMEL table
entry.content:
Hello Folks !

I’m working on a requirement where I need to create and update entries in the QMEL table using data from Excel. I tried using the function module ISU_DB_QMEL_UPDATE for the update operation.

However, during testing: When I use update mode (X_UPD_MODE = 'U'), it always returns SY-SUBRC = 4 and says the record does not exist.

When I switch to insert mode (X_UPD_MODE = 'I'), it throws an error saying the record already exists.

If there's a recommended BAPI for creating or updating QMEL entries (including Z-fields), I’d appreciate your suggestions. Thanks !

entry.title: how to add and populate two custom fields in additional tab at header level for PO
entry.content:
I have a requirement to add and populate two custom fields in the additional tab at header level for Purchase Order. Please help to identify the best way to achieve this. Thanks in advance.

@DominikTylczyn @Sandra_Rossi @SAPSupport

entry.title: Shared Object Memory for ABAP for Cloud Development?
entry.content:
There are great posts available showing how to utilize shared memory objects & SAP transaction 'SHMA' that can be used in Standard ABAP.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/shared-memory-objects-transfer-data-between-abap-programs/ba-p/13451524

While refactoring for ABAP for Cloud Development, I came accross the error "The use of Interface IF_SHM_BUILD_INSTANCE" is not permitted. Is there any equivalent to Shared Object Memory Areas that is compatible with ABAP for Cloud Development ABAP syntax?

ABAP Cloud Development usage Error

Yoloyoda's abap cloud cheatsheet does give an example of using the DATA BUFFER, however, this does not seem to be on par with the control we used to have SHMA.


__PRESENT
